name: the daily PR-corpus monitor refuses to start when the quality-eval gate has not produced a pass result on disk
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus && printf '{"gate":"fail","precision":0.5,"mean_usefulness":2.5}\n' > pr-corpus/quality-eval.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/monitor.sh" --gate-result pr-corpus/quality-eval.json --once 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'quality_eval_gate=fail' err.txt && grep -q 'monitor_blocked' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
